history.title: About Plump
history.description1: At Plump Casino, we combine welcome rewards, ongoing promotions and flexible crypto payouts. Our casino stands out by bringing casino bonuses, live tables, Plump Originals and sportsbook betting together under one account.
history.description2: lump Casino is our crypto-focused online casino and sportsbook, built for players who value speed, variety and transparent gameplay. We combine slots, live casino, table games, crash formats, Plump Originals and sports betting in one account. Our casino works across desktop and mobile devices, giving access to the lobby, balance, bonuses, transaction history and support tools.
history.description3:
The game catalogue includes video slots, live roulette, blackjack, baccarat, live game shows, crash games and exclusive Plump titles. For sports fans, our sportsbook covers football, tennis, basketball, esports and other popular markets. We support crypto deposits and withdrawals, with approved payouts usually submitted on-chain without unnecessary delays. Fairness is a core part of the Plump experience: selected games use provably fair mechanics, while classic casino games rely on RNG systems and established software providers.

Our promotions include a welcome bonus, free spins, reload offers, cashback, tournaments and exclusive campaigns. The welcome package may include a 100% first-deposit match up to around £800 in equivalent value plus 100 free spins, with exact terms depending on the promotion and account currency. For regular players, our VIP programme includes tier progression, rakeback, daily bonuses, weekly bonuses and monthly rewards. VIP progress is based on activity, while sportsbook bets may count at an enhanced rate compared with casino wagers. Higher levels can unlock personal offers, priority service, increased limits and access to a dedicated VIP host. We also support VIP Transfer, allowing players with status elsewhere to request a status review and possible privilege transfer.

Entertainment at Plump Casino goes beyond classic slots, with live tables, game shows, crash titles and Plump Originals creating different rhythms for different playing styles. Tournament and leaderboard mechanics depend on each campaign, with eligible wagers, spins, selected games, activity and final rankings all potentially playing a role. We focus on clean navigation, quick access to promotions, a practical wallet and support through live chat, the help centre and email. Responsible gaming tools include limits, self-exclusion and account closure options, helping keep play controlled. Plump Casino is designed as a modern crypto gaming platform where casino games, sportsbook betting, bonuses and VIP rewards work together in one ecosystem.

customHtml.title: Plump: your comfort — rules, security, support
customHtml.description:
Plump Casino — Access Rules, Player Safety and Responsible Gaming

At Plump Casino, we maintain a gaming environment for adults only. Account access is available after registration and acceptance of our platform rules. Players must provide accurate personal details because these may be used for identity checks, account protection and payout processing. Our casino may request KYC verification during registration, deposits, withdrawals, unusual account activity or internal security reviews. Using another person’s identity, payment method or wallet is not permitted. Each player should use only their own account unless our rules clearly allow another arrangement. We do not allow fraud, multiple accounts, collusion, technical abuse, restriction avoidance or bonus manipulation. Bonuses, free spins, cashback, tournaments and VIP rewards are governed by separate terms that should be checked before activation. In the sportsbook, bets may be rejected or cancelled because of odds changes, market rules, technical errors or suspicious activity. In casino games, outcomes are determined by RNG systems, live dealers or provably fair mechanics, and no result can be guaranteed in advance. We recommend setting a personal budget before playing and avoiding any view of gambling as regular income. Responsible gaming at Plump Casino includes limits, breaks, self-exclusion and support contact options. Self-exclusion restricts account access for the chosen period and helps players control their activity. Before closing an account, available balance should be withdrawn and open bets should be settled where possible. All transactions are reviewed through security processes, while larger or unusual operations may require manual checks. We may pause activity when further identity, source-of-funds or account review is required. Plump Casino places strong emphasis on clarity, so game rules, bonus rules and payout rules remain an essential part of the player experience.


Access Conditions

  • • Adults only — our account environment is intended for players aged 18 and over.
  • • Accurate registration — name, contact details and payment information should be correct.
  • • Personal account use — balance, game history and rewards belong to one account holder.
  • • Identity checks — KYC may be requested before withdrawals or during account review.
  • • Local compliance — players are responsible for checking whether online gaming is permitted where they are located.

Prohibited Activity

  • • Multi-accounting — creating several accounts to bypass restrictions is not allowed.
  • • Bonus abuse — systems designed to exploit promotions unfairly are prohibited.
  • • Account transfer — accounts must not be sold, shared or used by another person.
  • • Betting manipulation — collusion, technical exploitation and market abuse are not permitted.
  • • Third-party funds — deposits and withdrawals should be made by the account owner.

Responsible Gaming

  • • Personal limits — useful for managing deposits, wagers and session length.
  • • Cooling-off periods — suitable when temporary distance from play is needed.
  • • Self-exclusion — blocks login, deposits and betting for the selected duration.
  • • Account closure — available through support after open activity is settled.
  • • Emotional control — gambling should remain entertainment, not a financial plan.

Plump Casino — Licence, Data Protection and Privacy

Plump Casino operates as a crypto-focused gaming platform under Forward Solutions B.V. Our licensing framework is connected with the Curaçao Gaming Control Board, and the licence number is listed as OGL/2024/1226/0898. For us, licensing is not only permission to provide games; it also means maintaining responsible gaming procedures, customer checks, transaction monitoring and AML compliance.


Data protection at our casino is built around secure account access, careful handling of personal information and controlled financial activity. During registration, verification, deposits and withdrawals, we may process name details, contact information, technical data, login history, payment information and KYC documents. This information helps us operate accounts, prevent fraud, meet regulatory duties and protect player balances.


Plump Casino uses modern security measures such as protected connections, session control, device checks and optional two-factor authentication. 2FA adds another layer of account protection because a code from an authenticator app may be required for login or sensitive actions. We also encourage unique passwords, private account access and regular review of active sessions.


Financial security is supported by KYC and AML procedures. Verification may be required before withdrawals, during larger transactions, after unusual activity or whenever account ownership needs to be confirmed. This approach helps protect the platform from misuse, reduce unauthorised activity and ensure payouts are sent to the correct account holder.


Game integrity is supported through RNG technology, trusted providers and provably fair mechanics in selected Plump Originals. RNG systems support independent outcomes in slots and digital games, while live casino content is delivered through professional studios and dealers. For players, this means results are shaped by game rules, certified systems and chance rather than manual interference.


The Plump Casino privacy framework covers the collection, storage, use and protection of personal data. We use information for account service, payouts, support, abuse prevention, legal compliance and service improvement. Data should not be shared without a lawful reason, and access is limited to operational and compliance purposes.


Plump Casino — Deposits, Withdrawals and Payout Limits

At Plump Casino, we use a crypto-focused payment model, so digital currencies are the main deposit and withdrawal methods. Supported assets may include Bitcoin, Ethe­reum, Tether, TRON, Lite­coin, USDC and other coins available in the cashier. Crypto deposits usually depend on network con­fir­mation, and funds appear in the account once the required blockchain step is complete. Processing speed can vary by blockchain, network fee, congestion and selected coin. Players who prefer to start with a familiar payment tool may be able to buy crypto through an on-ramp using a bank card, Apple Pay, Google Pay or bank trans­fer through a payment partner. After purchase, the crypto balance is made available according to the provider’s flow and the selected payment method. Withdrawals are normally made in crypto and submitted on-chain after app­roval. Most approved payouts are processed quickly, although larger amounts, new accounts or unusual activity may require manual review. Transaction security is supported by KYC, AML checks, transaction monitoring and account ownership verification. Identity checks may be required before withdrawal, especially when the amount is large or source-of-funds information is needed. Withdrawal fees depend on the selected blockchain and may change during network congestion. We recommend checking wallet address, network and amount carefully before confirming a transaction because crypto transfers are usually irreversible. Withdrawal history can be used to review status and locate the txid for blockchain tracking. Plump Casino does not publish one fixed maximum withdrawal limit for every account, but larger payouts may be reviewed by the compliance team.


Method Deposit speed Payout after app­roval
Bitcoin After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
Ethe­reum After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
Tether After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
TRON After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
Lite­coin After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
USDC After network con­fir­mation Usually within minutes
Debit card on-ramp Provider-de­pen­dent Crypto with­drawal only
Apple Pay on-ramp Provider-de­pen­dent Crypto with­drawal only
Bank trans­fer on-ramp Provider-de­pen­dent Crypto with­drawal only

Withdrawal Limits

  • • Minimum BTC withdrawal — from around 0.0005 BTC, depending on network and account conditions.
  • • Minimum USDT withdrawal — around £8–£10 equivalent, depending on network and balance currency.
  • • Minimum ETH, TRX, LTC and USDC withdrawals — coin-specific and network-dependent.
  • • Daily maximum — no single fixed public cap applies to every account; large payouts may be reviewed.
  • • Monthly maximum — no single fixed public cap applies to every account; limits may depend on account status, VIP level and compliance checks.
  • • Large payouts — may require KYC, AML review, source-of-funds confirmation or manual app­roval.

Plump Casino — Customer Support and Service Quality

At Plump Casino, we treat support as a core part of the gaming experience, especially because crypto players often need clear answers about wallets, networks, transactions and verification. Our main contact channel is live chat, available directly on the platform. Live chat is suitable for account access, bonuses, deposits, withdrawals, games, VIP rewards and sportsbook questions. For matters that require documents, a longer explanation or additional review, email support is the preferred route. Email is especially useful for KYC checks, account closure, self-exclusion, data changes and transaction investigations. The Help Centre includes guidance on registration, security, deposits, withdrawals, bonuses, sportsbook activity and responsible gaming. We maintain a multilingual help structure so players can find core instructions in a familiar language. Materials may be available in English, Russian, French, Turkish, Japanese, Chinese, Hindi, Arabic, Bengali and other languages. Phone support is not positioned as a primary Plump Casino channel, so chat, the help centre and email remain the main service routes. This format works well for a crypto platform because written history helps review transactions, wallet details, txids and bonus terms accurately. Response time depends on the topic: simple chat questions are usually handled faster, while payout, KYC or security cases may need deeper review. When asking about a withdrawal, it helps to include account email, amount, coin, network and txid if the transaction has already been submitted. Service quality at Plump Casino is based on clear instructions, careful data review and account safety. Higher VIP levels may include a dedicated host who can assist with rewards, limits, status and personal account matters. We recommend using official channels only and never sharing passwords, seed phrases, private keys or 2FA codes. Support should not ask for information that gives direct access to an external crypto wallet. Responsible gaming requests, including limits, self-exclusion and account closure, can also be handled through support.


Contact Channels

  • • Live chat — fast contact for account, bonus, game and payment questions.
  • • Email support — suitable for KYC, documents, security and detailed cases.
  • • Help Centre — self-service guidance for account, wallet, bonus and sportsbook topics.
  • • VIP host — personal assistance for eligible VIP levels.
  • • Phone — not a primary channel; online and written support remain the priority.

Response Expectations

  • • Simple questions — usually handled faster through live chat.
  • • Payment questions — may require network, txid and wallet status checks.
  • • KYC requests — depend on document quality and compliance review.
  • • Bonus cases — reviewed according to the rules of the specific promotion.
  • • VIP matters — may be supported by a dedicated host.

Language Availability

  • • English — the main language for most support and help content.
  • • Russian — available across selected help materials and interface content.
  • • French and Turkish — included in the multilingual support structure.
  • • Japanese, Chinese and Hindi — useful for core account guidance.
  • • Arabic and Bengali — broaden access to Help Centre resources.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at  Plump
customHtml_2.description:
Plump Casino — VIP Programme, Tiers and Rewards

At Plump Casino, our VIP programme is designed for players who regularly use casino games, Plump Originals, live casino and the sportsbook. Participation is based on account activity: the more eligible wagering is recognised by the system, the more tier progress may be achieved. Casino wagers may count at the standard 1x rate, while sportsbook wagers may count at a 3x rate. Voided or cancelled bets should not count towards VIP progress. The VIP ladder includes Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, Emerald, Ruby, Diamond, Diamond Elite, Champion, Legend, Master, Grandmaster and Eternal. Early levels provide access to the programme, rakeback and selected reward mechanics. As players move higher, personal offers, stronger support attention, level-up bonuses and broader rewards can become more visible. Rakeback returns a calculated part of the house edge or rake from eligible play when it meets programme rules. Daily bonus, weekly bonus and monthly bonus features may also be available, with amount and eligibility depending on activity, VIP level and current promotions. A daily bonus may refresh every 24 hours, while a monthly bonus is usually linked to eligible activity from the previous period. Reload bonus value can be based on wagering and performance over a set timeframe, so amounts may vary between accounts. Level-up bonus rewards are issued when a new tier is reached. Higher-status players may receive access to a dedicated VIP host. A personal host can assist with tailored offers, status, limits, faster communication and reward questions. With VIP Transfer, players can request a status review based on VIP standing from another platform. Transfer approval depends on status verification, activity history and Plump Casino’s internal criteria. We keep responsible gaming at the centre of the VIP experience, so rewards do not remove limits, KYC, AML checks or self-control tools. Any bonus, including rakeback or level-up rewards, may include conditions, game restrictions, limits and withdrawal rules. Before using a reward, players should review wagering requirements, expiry periods and eligible games. The Plump Casino VIP programme works as a long-term status system where regular eligible activity can unlock more personalised options without promising a guaranteed outcome.


Registration Conditions

  • • Plump Casino account — participation starts after creating a personal account.
  • • Adult status — access is intended for players aged 18 and over.
  • • Accurate details — personal information should match documents during KYC.
  • • Eligible activity — only qualifying wagers count towards programme progress.
  • • Rule compliance — fraud, multi-accounting and bonus abuse prevent participation.
  • • Verification review — KYC may be required before payouts or higher limits.

VIP Tiers and Progress

  • • Bronze — the opening VIP stage for early programme access.
  • • Silver — the next level with broader basic reward access.
  • • Gold — a tier for stronger activity and visible progress.
  • • Platinum — an elevated status with more personal options.
  • • Emerald — a tier with enhanced VIP offer access.
  • • Ruby — an advanced level for regular eligible play.
  • • Diamond — a high tier with priority service elements.
  • • Diamond Elite — an expanded Diamond level with deeper privileges.
  • • Champion — a status for major accumulated progress.
  • • Legend — a tier focused on personalised rewards and support.
  • • Master — a high status with individual account attention.
  • • Grandmaster — one of the upper levels of the VIP ladder.
  • • Eternal — the top status for the most active eligible participants.
  • • How to progress — place eligible wagers, stay active and follow account rules.

Available Rewards

  • • Rakeback — returns part of calculated rake or house edge from eligible play.
  • • Daily bonus — a reward that may refresh every 24 hours.
  • • Weekly bonus — a periodic reward linked to weekly activity.
  • • Monthly bonus — based on previous-month activity and VIP level.
  • • Reload bonus — extra balance based on activity and period results.
  • • Level-up bonus — awarded when a new VIP tier is reached.
  • • VIP Transfer — a status review option for players with VIP standing elsewhere.
  • • Dedicated host — personal account support for eligible levels.
  • • Higher limits — may become available after account review.
  • • Special campaigns — tailored offers for selected VIP groups.

Plump Casino — Bonuses, Promotions, Tournaments and Special Offers

At Plump Casino, the bonus system extends beyond the VIP programme through promotions, game campaigns, tournaments, free spins and seasonal events. The welcome bonus may include a 100% first-deposit match up to around £800 in equivalent value plus 100 free spins. This type of offer helps introduce players to the lobby, slots and selected promotional games, while remaining subject to its own terms. Reload bonuses may be available for players who continue using their account after the first deposit. Reload value depends on the active campaign, account activity, balance currency and promotional period. Cashback may be credited through selected promotions and is usually linked to results or eligible wagering over a defined timeframe. We use cashback as a return-style reward, but calculation rules and caps are always set by the promotion terms. Free spins may appear in the welcome package, reload campaigns, seasonal promotions or game-specific offers. Free spins are usually attached to selected slots and may include an expiry period. Tournaments at Plump Casino may run across slots, crash games, live casino or mixed categories. In leaderboard campaigns, eligible wagers, spins, multipliers, results or points may be counted according to the tournament rules. Giveaways and exclusive campaigns can support the regular bonus schedule during sporting events, holidays or new game releases. Sportsbook promotions may include enhanced markets, event-based specials or selected match campaigns where available in the account. Casino promotions may be linked to providers, new slots, live game shows or Plump Originals. Each offer should be checked for wagering requirements; one example can be 20x the bonus amount, although the exact figure depends on the promotion. Some games may contribute fully to wagering, while others contribute partly or may be excluded. We keep the terms clear by showing minimum deposit, maximum bet, eligible games, expiry and withdrawal conditions in the promotion details. Special offers do not guarantee a win because outcomes depend on game rules, RNG systems, live dealers or provably fair mechanics. Plump Casino keeps the promotions area varied with deposit bonuses, free spins, cashback, tournaments, giveaways and sportsbook campaigns.


Bonuses and Special Offers

  • • Welcome Bonus — 100% on the first deposit up to around £800 equivalent plus 100 free spins.
  • • Deposit Bonus — extra balance added according to the current promotion rules.
  • • Reload Bonus — a periodic offer for continued play after the first deposit.
  • • Free Spins — spins on selected slots, often with a limited expiry period.
  • • Cashback — a return-style reward based on activity or period results.
  • • Tournaments — competitions across slots, live casino, crash games or mixed categories.
  • • Leaderboards — rankings using points from wagers, spins, multipliers or results.
  • • Giveaways — one-off prize campaigns or exclusive promotional events.
  • • Sportsbook Specials — offers around selected sports events, markets or matches.
  • • New Game Promotions — campaigns linked to fresh slots, Plump Originals or live games.
  • • Seasonal Events — promotions around holidays, sports seasons and major occasions.
  • • Wagering Example — selected bonuses may include requirements such as 20x the bonus amount.

Plump Casino — Casino Games and Sportsbook Betting

Plump Casino combines classic online casino content, live casino, original crypto games and sportsbook betting. The game lobby includes video slots from different providers, including modern releases, classic mechanics, Megaways-style formats, bonus rounds and high-volatility titles. Slots suit players who enjoy simple spin-based play, varied themes, free spins, multipliers and random features. Live casino at our platform includes real dealers and real-time streaming. The live section may include roulette, blackjack, baccarat, game shows and VIP tables. This format feels closer to a studio casino because players can see the dealer, table, bets and round progress live. Digital table games include roulette, blackjack, baccarat, video poker, keno and other fast formats without live streaming. Plump Originals form a separate part of the catalogue, built for crypto-focused play and quick sessions. Original formats include Plinko, Dice, Mines, Cross the Road, Crash, Coinflip, Diamonds, Dragons Tower, Slider, Keno, Limbo, HiLo, Wheel, Blackjack and other titles. Many of these games use simple rules, fast rounds and selectable risk levels. Crash games stand out through a rising multiplier where timing and game mechanics define the result. The Plump Casino sportsbook covers popular sports and events. Betting markets may include football, tennis, basketball, esports, virtual sports and other categories. In the sportsbook, players choose an event, market, odds and stake, while settlement follows the rules of the selected market. Virtual sports add simulated events that run frequently and do not rely on a real-world fixture calendar. Our casino also works with providers delivering slots, live games, table games and crash formats. The catalogue may include Evolution, Pragmatic Play, NetEnt, BGaming, Hacksaw Gaming, Nolimit City, Red Tiger and other studios. Games are optimised for mobile devices, keeping the lobby, search, categories and wallet accessible across screens. We focus on variety, so one account can cover slots, live dealers, original games, quick crash sessions and sports betting.


Casino Games

  • • Slots — video slots with bonuses, free spins, multipliers and different volatility profiles.
  • • Live Roulette — roulette with a real dealer and live streaming.
  • • Live Blackjack — card play with dealer interaction, table limits and quick rounds.
  • • Baccarat — a classic card game in digital and live formats.
  • • Game Shows — live entertainment with wheels, multipliers and interactive rounds.
  • • Video Poker — a digital poker-style format with a fast pace.
  • • Keno — a number-based game with simple rules and quick results.
  • • Plump Originals — exclusive games with crypto-focused mechanics.

Plump Originals

  • • Plinko — a ball drops through a board and lands in a multiplier sector.
  • • Dice — players choose a condition and the result depends on a random number.
  • • Mines — players reveal tiles while avoiding hidden mines.
  • • Crash — a multiplier rises until the round ends.
  • • Coinflip — a simple two-sided outcome format.
  • • Limbo — a target multiplier game with instant resolution.
  • • HiLo — a higher-or-lower decision series using card-style mechanics.
  • • Wheel — a wheel-based game with different multiplier sectors.

Sportsbook

  • • Football — match results, totals, handicaps and additional markets.
  • • Tennis — match, set, game and live-event markets.
  • • Basketball — results, spreads, totals and in-game options.
  • • Esports — competitive gaming events and match markets.
  • • Virtual Sports — simulated events with frequent schedules.
  • • Special Markets — extra options depending on the event.

Plump Casino — Minimum and Maximum Stakes

At Plump Casino, stake limits depend on the selected game, provider, balance currency, VIP status and account limits. The ranges below are practical guide values for common lobby categories. Exact amounts are shown inside the chosen game or sportsbook market before the bet is confirmed. Bonus play may include separate maximum-stake restrictions.


Game Type Min Bet Max Bet
Video slots £0.10 £100
Live black­jack £1 £10,000
Live rou­lette £0.20 £5,000
Bac­carat £1 £10,000
Crash games £0.10 £5,000
Plump Ori­ginals £0.10 £5,000
Video poker £0.10 £500
Keno £0.10 £1,000
Sports­book £0.10 Market-de­pen­dent
Virtual sports £0.10 Market-de­pen­dent

Plump Casino — Tournaments and Leaderboards

At Plump Casino, tournaments and leaderboards may run across slots, live casino, Plump Originals, crash games or mixed categories. Participation usually starts after logging in and meeting the conditions of the specific campaign. Tournament rules define eligible games, campaign duration, qualifying stakes and prize distribution. Points may be awarded for eligible wagers, number of spins, activity in selected games, winning multipliers or final results. Some tournaments may focus on total turnover, while others may reward the highest multiplier, a result streak or leaderboard position. The leaderboard shows current ranking and helps players track progress during the campaign. Ranking data may update instantly or with a delay if stated in the rules. To keep a valid position, players must follow stake rules, avoid prohibited strategies and play only eligible games. A prize may be credited automatically or after the Plump Casino team reviews the results. If confirmation is required, final settlement, KYC or rule-compliance checks may apply. Tournaments do not guarantee a prize because the outcome depends on activity, results and the rules of the specific leaderboard.


How to Participate

  • • Log in — tournament progress is linked to the account profile.
  • • Check rules — games, dates, currencies and stakes must match the campaign.
  • • Play eligible games — only approved titles count towards the leaderboard.
  • • Track timing — each tournament runs during a limited period.
  • • Avoid violations — multi-accounting and bonus abuse are prohibited.

How Points May Be Awarded

  • • Stake value — points may depend on eligible wagering amount.
  • • Spins — slot tournaments may count spin volume or spin results.
  • • Multiplier — crash games and Plump Originals may reward higher multipliers.
  • • Active time — selected campaigns may consider participation time.
  • • Result — ranking may depend on win amount or net result.

How to Claim a Prize

  • • Automatic credit — a prize or bonus may appear after the campaign ends.
  • • Result review — the team may confirm that no rules were breached.
  • • KYC — larger rewards may require identity verification.
  • • Expiry period — bonus prizes may have a limited usage window.
  • • Account history — credits and payouts can be checked in balance or promotion records.

items.title: Which cryptocurrencies can be used at Plump Casino?
items.answer: Account options may include Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tether, TRON, Litecoin, USDC and other supported assets. The final list depends on cashier settings, networks and wallet availability.

items.title: Can crypto be bought with a bank card?
items.answer: Yes, on-ramp providers may support bank cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay and other crypto purchase methods. After purchase, funds are used in crypto format within the account.

items.title: What should be done if a deposit is missing?
items.answer: The network, wallet address, confirmation count and transaction status should be checked first. If the transfer was sent but the balance has not updated, support can review the txid, coin, amount and sending time.

items.title: Why can a sportsbook bet be rejected?
items.answer: A bet may be rejected because of odds movement, market closure, a technical issue, insufficient balance or event-specific rules. In that case, the bet should not be treated as active.

items.title: What are Plump Originals?
items.answer: Plump Originals are our exclusive casino games, including Plinko, Dice, Mines, Crash, Limbo, HiLo, Wheel and other fast formats. They focus on simple rules, quick rounds and crypto-style gameplay.

items.title: How can a withdrawal be checked?
items.answer: After processing, the withdrawal history may show a txid. This can be used to review the transaction on the relevant blockchain.

items.title: What can players do to limit gaming activity?
items.answer: Plump Casino provides responsible gaming tools such as limits, breaks, self-exclusion and account closure. Support can help select the most suitable restriction.
